nuggets.headline: Pete Rango's Live Sound Resume Includes Both Kodak Black and David Duchovny
nuggets.text: Beyond his production work, Pete Rango has spent over four years as a freelance live audio engineer. His resume shows immense versatility, running front-of-house for hip-hop acts like Denzel Curry and XXXTentacion, and also for actor-turned-musician David Duchovny. This hands-on experience in drastically different live environments informs the polish and adaptability in his studio recordings.

source.title: Meet Pete Rango - Voyage MIA Magazine | Miami City Guide
source.quoteSnippet: I've been freelancing in the Audio/Visual world for over 4 years now. ... My live audio work for concerts includes artists such as ... Denzel Curry, XXXTentacion, Kodak Black ... and David Duchovny.

nuggets.imageCaption: Pete Rango in the studio, where his diverse live audio experience informs his production.

nuggets.headline: On 'Savage Planet,' Listen for the Xmane Collaboration on 'Planet X' and 'Traag Park'
nuggets.text: While you're in the world of the 2022 album "Savage Planet," listen for how Rango uses collaboration to build out the record's texture. On the tracks "Planet X" and "Traag Park," he brings in artist Xmane, creating a distinct interplay that contrasts with the solo construction of "Oms at Play." This demonstrates his role as a culture-builder, curating specific creative collisions within a single project.

source.title: Savage Planet by Pete Rango
source.quoteSnippet: Savage Planet is an album by Pete Rango released in 2022. ... Planet X (Ft. Pete Rango & Xmane). Traag Park (Ft. Pete Rango & Xmane).

nuggets.imageCaption: Oms at Play by Pete Rango

nuggets.headline: If 'Oms at Play' Connects, Explore Teebs' 2011 LP 'Ardour'
nuggets.text: The layered, textural feel of Rango's production has a clear ancestor in the L.A. beat scene, specifically in the work of Brainfeeder artist Teebs. His album 'Ardour' is a masterclass in 'painted sound,' where beat structures dissolve into warm, melodic washes. It's the same brand of experimentalism that blurs the line between instrumental hip-hop and ambient electronics, a space Rango operates in expertly.

source.title: Meet Pete Rango - Voyage MIA Magazine | Miami City Guide
source.quoteSnippet: I started discovering electronic music and getting into mashups and mixing different genres...I started developing artists and getting more into hip-hop.

nuggets.imageCaption: Brainfeeder artist Teebs, whose work bridges instrumental hip-hop and ambient electronics.

artistSummary: Colombian-born, Virginia-based producer Pete Rango is a culture-builder fusing a DIY spirit with future-forward electronic and hip-hop production. Through his XUE Records and L.I.V. Corp nonprofit, he aims to uplift communities and make the system nervous.
